name: Qualia Bar Display Demo (PID 5797)
description: Tests TL032FWV01CT-I1440A Rectangle Bar RGB TTL TFT Display (320x820) on Adafruit Qualia ESP32-S3. Responds to checkin, configures the display via RGB666 interface, then writes test messages.

steps.name: checkin-response
steps.description: Respond to device checkin with OK and board capabilities

steps.name: add-display
steps.description: Configure the RGB TTL Bar display (320x820, RGB666 interface)

steps.name: write-hello
steps.description: Write a test message to the bar display

write.name: qualia-bar
write.message:
Hello from ProtoMQ!
Qualia Bar Display
320x820 RGB TTL
PID 5797
